subject: feat(search): add address search with autocomplete and deferred GPS
body:
Replace the submit-only address bar with a full autocomplete dropdown
using Mapbox Geocoding API (debounced 300ms, 5 suggestions, scoped to ZA).
Defer GPS prompting so the app starts instantly with JHB as default —
GPS only triggers when the user taps the crosshair locate button.
Add blue dot on web map when GPS is active, and conditionally show
native UserLocation only when GPS has been explicitly activated.

Tags: search, gps, map, ux, geocoding
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: address-search
Semver: minor

title: add address search with autocomplete and deferred GPS
